step_rationale: Alcohol dehydrogenase 1B; alcohol metabolism enzyme; CAD association likely mediated via lipid and inflammatory pathways.
mechanism: ADH1B variants influence alcohol-dependent lipid metabolism and systemic inflammation, modulating cardiovascular disease risk.

references.title: Exploring Potential Drug Targets in Multiple Cardiovascular Diseases: A Study Based on Proteome-Wide Mendelian Randomization and Colocalization Analysis.
